ol.li: Final ACK loss recovery If final ACK is lost, server retransmits FIN. Client must remain to re-ACK.
Old segment purge Prevents delayed segments from old connection being misinterpreted by new connection with same 4-tuple.

ul.li: Port exhaustion on active closer side
No FIN handshake — abrupt termination ⚠️ Use only when data integrity is not a concern!

div.p: When It Happens Both sides call close() at nearly the same time — FINs cross in flight. Common in:
State Transitions ESTABLISHED → FIN_WAIT_1 (send FIN) FIN_WAIT_1 → CLOSING (recv FIN before ACK) CLOSING → TIME_WAIT (recv ACK) TIME_WAIT → CLOSED (2*MSL timeout) Both sides enter TIME_WAIT!
